name: libsub-quote-perl
title: libsub-quote-perl
description:
helper modules for subroutines
This package includes two modules:
.
Sub::Quote provides performant ways to generate subroutines from strings.
.
Sub::Defer contains subroutines which provide the user with a convenient way
to defer creation of subroutines and methods until they are first called.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsub-quote-perl because helper modules for subroutines.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsub-quote-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsub-quote-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsub-quote-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
